name: _Group_Tool_Executor
content: Plan comparator decision recorded: reuse=True, restart_at_step=2. The first step of the new plan (Data Preprocessing) is largely covered by the first step of the old plan (Data Cleaning, Harmonization, and Index Construction). While the new plan has a different analytical focus (LCA and Elastic Net instead of Ordinal Logistic Regression and Random Forest), the initial data cleaning and feature engineering are foundational and have already been performed. Therefore, we can reuse the results of the first step and restart the new analytical workflow from step 2.
